name: The First Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Full-service bank offering personal, business, agricultural, mortgage, and wealth management services with online and mobile banking platforms.
description_long: First Bank & Trust Company is a full-service commercial bank providing comprehensive financial services across multiple customer segments. The bank has been established long enough to publish annual reports to shareholders and maintains a substantial digital and branch infrastructure. The bank offers a wide range of services including personal checking and savings accounts, personal loans, student loans, and mortgage products (conventional, jumbo, FHA, VA, USDA rural development, and construction loans). For business customers, they provide commercial checking, business loans, lines of credit, term loans, small business lending, and USDA Business & Industry Guaranteed Loans. Their agricultural division specializes in farm operating loans, equipment financing, and real estate loans across multiple farming sectors (dairy, beef cattle, row crops, poultry, swine, forestry, and specialty agriculture). They also offer wealth management services including investment management, brokerage services, retirement planning, and trust administration. The bank distinguishes itself through specialized lending divisions tailored to agricultural and business clients, offering USDA-guaranteed loan programs not typically available at consumer-focused banks. They provide comprehensive digital banking including mobile deposit, bill pay, Zelle integration, and virtual StrongBox. Their wealth management arm includes estate planning, charitable planning, and trust services alongside traditional investment management. As a traditional bank, First Bank & Trust operates within standard banking regulations and deposit insurance protections. Customers should be aware that detailed information about interest rates, fees, minimum balances, and lending terms is not available on the website and would require direct contact or branch visits. The bank's strength lies in serving small-to-medium business, agricultural, and wealth management clients rather than consumer loan specialization.
services: Mortgage loans (conventional, jumbo, FHA, VA, USDA, construction, bridge, refinance, home equity)
Business checking, savings, and specialty accounts
Commercial loans (lines of credit, term loans, real estate, small business lending)
Agricultural loans (operating, equipment, real estate, USDA FSA-guaranteed)
Mobile and online banking with mobile deposit and bill pay
Wealth management and investment management services
Trust administration and estate settlement services
Cash management and merchant services for businesses
Payroll services and qualified retirement plans
pros: Specialized agricultural lending across 9+ farm types with dedicated ag lenders and USDA FSA-guaranteed loan programs
Multiple mortgage product options including VA loans, FHA loans, USDA rural development, construction-to-permanent, and bridge loans
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile deposit, bill pay, Zelle, and virtual StrongBox
Dedicated commercial lending team with solutions for cash management, merchant services, and treasury management
Full wealth management division with investment management, brokerage services, estate planning, and trust administration
USDA Business & Industry Guaranteed Loans available for small business customers
Multiple login portals for different customer types (online banking, trust customers, merchant services, 401k services)
cons: No interest rates, APRs, fees, or minimum balance requirements disclosed on website
No information about loan terms, approval timelines, or qualification requirements available
Limited transparency on whether this is a regional or national bank with branch availability
No online loan application process visible; customers must contact lenders directly
No information about deposit insurance coverage or FDIC status explicitly stated on reviewed content
best_for: Agricultural business owners and farmers seeking specialized lending and USDA-guaranteed loan programs
Small-to-medium business owners needing commercial checking, lines of credit, and business lending
High-net-worth individuals seeking comprehensive wealth management, trust administration, and investment services
Homebuyers interested in diverse mortgage products including VA, FHA, and rural development loans
diagnosis: First Bank & Trust Company is best for agricultural operators, small-to-medium business owners, and affluent individuals seeking comprehensive financial services including specialized lending and wealth management. The main caveat is that critical details about rates, fees, and lending terms are not available online, requiring direct contact with the bank or branch visits to evaluate specific offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: The First Bank and Trust Company
